# WC 2026 Predictor - World Cup 2026 Betting Predictions App

WC 2026 Predictor is a free Android app for FIFA World Cup 2026 betting predictions, match forecasts, score insights, bracket simulation, and football analytics.

## App

- Official website: https://djsoldier88.github.io/wc2026predictor/
- Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.wc2026.predictor
- Sitemap: https://djsoldier88.github.io/wc2026predictor/sitemap.xml

## Language hubs

- English: https://djsoldier88.github.io/wc2026predictor/en/ - English guides, betting tips, match forecasts, and app links for FIFA World Cup 2026 predictions.
- Russian: https://djsoldier88.github.io/wc2026predictor/ru/ - Russian-language guides for World Cup 2026 predictions, betting tips, match analysis, and the WC 2026 Predictor app.
- Spanish: https://djsoldier88.github.io/wc2026predictor/es/ - Spanish-language guides for World Cup 2026 predictions, betting tips, and match analysis.
- French: https://djsoldier88.github.io/wc2026predictor/fr/ - French-language guides for World Cup 2026 predictions, sports betting tips, and match analysis.
- Portuguese: https://djsoldier88.github.io/wc2026predictor/pt/ - Portuguese-language guides for World Cup 2026 predictions, betting tips, and match analysis.
- Arabic: https://djsoldier88.github.io/wc2026predictor/ar/ - Arabic-language guides for World Cup 2026 match predictions, betting tips, and football analysis.
